commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: This conduct may also tend toward the salvation of the master. They will see that their slaves through the grace of God have become faithful ministers. This is no small thing. They will then come to praise God’s grace as well.

commentaries.author: The Apostolic Constitutions
commentaries.content: As to the representatives of God, with attention and fear, "as to the Lord, and not to men."
